threat: Hewlett Packard Enterprise fixes critical authentication byp
content:
#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 — Hewlett Packard Enterprise fixes critical authentication byp
iptables -A INPUT -s 3.2.0.1 -j DROP
iptables -A OUTPUT -d 3.2.0.1 -j DROP

content:
